## Signature

```ts
function computeFlowLines(
	segments: readonly PreparedSegment[],
	opts: ComputeFlowLinesOptions,

```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `segments` | `readonly PreparedSegment[]` | segments value used by the helper. |
